events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: shackle side-loaded during active rigging. Side loading a shackle is a violation of ASME B30 and OSHA 1926.251. Shackles are designed for in-line loading; side loading reduces WLL significantly and can cause failure. This is a critical hazard. Immediate controls: stop the lift, reconfigure rigging so the shackle is loaded in-line (pin aligned with load line), use a proper shackle or swivel/turnbuckle if needed, inspect shackle for deformation, replace if damaged.
